title: A Lament For Fair-Haired Donough That Was Hanged In Galway
meaning:
Isabella Augusta, Lady Gregory's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Lament For Fair-Haired Donough That Was Hanged In Galway"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
